parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  alert_type,
  display_name,
  creates_tasks,
  default_department,
  task_title_template,
  info_creates_task,
  accumulation_threshold,
  accumulation_window_hours,
  cooldown_after_completion_hours,
  dismissed_cooldown_days
FROM action_center.alert_config 
WHERE alert_type = '{{ $json.alert_type }}'
LIMIT 1;

-- Check for existing open task with same dedupe_key
-- Also respect dismissed task cooldown
WITH dedupe_key AS (
  SELECT '{{ $json.alert_type }}:{{ $json.affected_resource }}' AS key
)
SELECT 
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.priority,
  t.status,
  t.completed_at,
  t.dismissed_at,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.status IN ('open', 'in_progress') THEN 'duplicate_open'
    WHEN t.dismissed_at IS NOT NULL 
      AND t.dismissed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '{{ $json.config.dismissed_cooldown_days }} days' 
    THEN 'dismissed_recently'
    WHEN t.completed_at IS NOT NULL 
      AND t.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '{{ $json.config.cooldown_after_completion_hours }} hours' 
    THEN 'completed_recently'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS duplicate_status
FROM action_center.tasks t, dedupe_key
WHERE t.dedupe_key = dedupe_key.key
  AND (
    t.status IN ('open', 'in_progress')
    OR (t.dismissed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '{{ $json.config.dismissed_cooldown_days }} days')
    OR (t.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '{{ $json.config.cooldown_after_completion_hours }} hours')
  )
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- Escalate task priority
UPDATE action_center.tasks
SET 
  priority = '{{ $json.task_priority }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.existing_task_id }}'::UUID
RETURNING id, title, priority;

INSERT INTO action_center.tasks (
  title,
  description,
  priority,
  due_date,
  due_time,
  department,
  source,
  related_entity_type,
  related_entity_id,
  related_entity_url,
  dedupe_key,
  status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.task_title }}',
  '{{ $json.task_description }}',
  '{{ $json.task_priority }}',
  {{ $json.calculated_due_date ? "'" + $json.calculated_due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.calculated_due_time ? "'" + $json.calculated_due_time + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.department }}',
  'alert',
  '{{ $json.alert_type }}',
  '{{ $json.source_alert_id || $json.occurrence_id }}',
  '/alerts/{{ $json.source_alert_id || $json.occurrence_id }}',
  '{{ $json.dedupe_key }}',
  'open'
)
RETURNING id, title, priority, status, created_at;
